title: space_query: null filter when empty matches RFC 8620 §5.5
description: space_query sends filter: null when no filter fields are set, rather than sending an empty object {} or omitting the key. This is the correct RFC 8620 §5.5 behavior: 'filter: null means no filter'. The test (Test 52) uses body_json to verify this and captures both the filter-present and null cases implicitly. A contributor might suggest simplifying by always sending filter: {} — that is wrong (some servers reject empty filter objects as invalid). The null-when-empty pattern should be preserved.
